SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-20-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-20-2017 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELE MCGILL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY PRISCILLA TOVAR, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, ANTHONY BLADIMIR SALINAS $1,212.96 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,327.96 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
